title: Certified Exact Integer LLL in Lean 4: Explicit Inverses, Total Rank Handling, and Profiled Costs
description: Independent lean-normal-forms research profile 0.1.0: exact row-vector LLL with a source-pinned terminating reducer, synchronized elementary-operation trace, explicit inverse certificates, an HNF-based total rank-deficient wrapper, a transpose-only column adapter, exact event telemetry, intermediate coefficient evidence, and an explicitly scoped profile-dependent bit-operation budget.
